scored.statedInsightEvidence: Okay, so the checked boxes are not enough for sign-off if the sideways walker approach can still put someone into the edge strip or off the travel line.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to seek reassurance on wording and proceed with testing the ramp.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The weak point has moved. The ramp test matters, but the release instruction has to hold when the room gets busy.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor shifts focus from the technical ramp testing to the operational communication at the door when they realize the learner is still hesitant and the room is getting busy.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.
